meta.title: Why is Qassem Suleimani Smiling? The Iran Deal and Sanctions Relief for Terrorists
meta.description: Lee Smith, Derek Harvey, Jack Keane & Michael Pregent discuss the danger of sanctions relief for terrorists like Qassem Suleimani in the Iran Deal.
